description_long: This is a bulbous, dark gray ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body tapering to a narrower neck and flared rim. The surface is matte and shows signs of age, with visible wear, discoloration, and a few chips and cracks. The upper neck features incised geometric patterns, including zigzag and chevron motifs, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise plain body. The body has several small holes and surface abrasions, suggesting historical use or weathering. The vase appears hand-crafted, with subtle irregularities in shape and finish. Its overall form and ornamentation evoke a utilitarian yet decorative vessel suitable for display or holding dried arrangements.
description: A weathered, dark gray ceramic vase with a rounded body, narrow neck, and incised geometric patterns on the rim. The surface shows visible wear, chips, and decorative motifs.
description_view_0: This view highlights the incised zigzag and chevron patterns on the neck and rim, as well as a prominent hole and abrasion on the lower body.
description_view_1: The vase's rounded body and narrow neck are visible, with surface discoloration and cracks more apparent on the upper section.
description_view_2: This side shows a large white abrasion across the body and a small chip at the base, with minimal visible ornamentation.
description_view_3: The geometric patterns on the neck are clearly visible, along with a large white patch and a small hole on the lower body.
